`MorphoGAM` is an R package designed for identifying spatially variable
genes in spatial transcriptomics data by projecting the data onto
morphologically relevant curves. This approach allows for the detection
of genes that exhibit spatial patterns aligned with the underlying
tissue morphology.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`CurveFinder()`](https://phillipnicol.github.io/MorphoGAM/reference/CurveFinder.md)
  : CurveFinder: Automatically estimate curve in two-dimensional ST data
- [`CurveFinderInteractive()`](https://phillipnicol.github.io/MorphoGAM/reference/CurveFinderInteractive.md)
  : Interactively sketch and smooth a curve through 2D points
- [`CurveFinderInteractive_img()`](https://phillipnicol.github.io/MorphoGAM/reference/CurveFinderInteractive_img.md)
  : Interactively sketch and smooth a curve on an optional image
- [`MorphoGAM()`](https://phillipnicol.github.io/MorphoGAM/reference/MorphoGAM.md)
  : MorphoGAM: Apply a GAM to morphologically relevant coordinates
- [`plotFPCloading()`](https://phillipnicol.github.io/MorphoGAM/reference/plotFPCloading.md)
  : Plot top gene loadings from SVD Analysis
- [`plotGAMestimates()`](https://phillipnicol.github.io/MorphoGAM/reference/plotGAMestimates.md)
  : Plot depth-normalized counts with fitted GAM overlay
